description: The problem Aged backlog dashboard gives problem managers a high-level view of aging of Problems.

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
(COUNT(`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Problem Investigation ID`)) ProblemCount
FROM `AR System Schema`.`PBM:Problem Investigation`
WHERE (
( `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Problem Investigation ID` IS NOT NULL)
AND (`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Investigation Status` NOT In ('Draft','Completed','Closed','Cancelled')) 
AND (`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Company` In ($Company)) 
AND (`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Assigned Group` In ($AssignedGroup)) 
AND (`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Impact` In ($Impact))
)

SELECT DISTINCT
AVG(DATEDIFF('day',`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date`, CurrentDate())) AS C1
FROM `PBM:Problem Investigation`
WHERE (`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Company` In ($Company)) 
AND (`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Assigned Group` In ($AssignedGroup)) 
AND (`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Impact` In ($Impact))
AND (`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Investigation Status` NOT In ('Draft','Completed','Closed','Cancelled'))

SELECT DISTINCT
      `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Problem Investigation ID`,
      `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Priority`,
       `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Investigation Status` AS C3,
       `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Assigned Group` AS C11,
     DATEDIFF('day',`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date`, CurrentDate()) AS C18,
      CASE
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 5 THEN '0 - 5 days'
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 15 THEN '6 - 15 days'
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 30 THEN '16 - 30 days'
         ELSE 'More than 30 days'
      END AS Aging,
      CASE
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 5 THEN 1
         ELSE 0
      END AS C24,
      CASE
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) > 5
         AND DATEDIFF('day', `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 15 THEN 1
         ELSE 0
      END AS C25,
      CASE
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) > 15
         AND DATEDIFF('day', `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 30 THEN 1
         ELSE 0
      END AS C26,
      CASE
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) > 30 THEN 1
         ELSE 0
      END AS C27
   FROM `AR System Schema`.`PBM:Problem Investigation`
WHERE (`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Company` In ($Company)) 
AND (`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Assigned Group` In ($AssignedGroup)) 
AND (`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Impact` In ($Impact))
AND (`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Investigation Status` NOT In ('Draft','Completed','Closed','Cancelled'))

SELECT DISTINCT
      `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Problem Investigation ID`,
      `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Priority`,
       `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Investigation Status` AS C3,
       `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Assigned Group` AS C11,
     DATEDIFF('day',`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date`, CurrentDate()) AS C18,
      CASE
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 5 THEN '0 - 5 days'
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 15 THEN '6 - 15 days'
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 30 THEN '16 - 30 days'
         ELSE 'More than 30 days'
      END AS Aging,
      CASE
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 5 THEN 1
         ELSE 0
      END AS C24,
      CASE
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) > 5
         AND DATEDIFF('day', `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 15 THEN 1
         ELSE 0
      END AS C25,
      CASE
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) > 15
         AND DATEDIFF('day', `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 30 THEN 1
         ELSE 0
      END AS C26,
      CASE
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) > 30 THEN 1
         ELSE 0
      END AS C27
   FROM `AR System Schema`.`PBM:Problem Investigation`
WHERE (`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Company` In ($Company)) 
AND (`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Assigned Group` In ($AssignedGroup)) 
AND (`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Impact` In ($Impact))
AND (`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Investigation Status` NOT In ('Draft','Completed','Closed','Cancelled'))

SELECT DISTINCT
      `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Problem Investigation ID`,
      `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Priority`,
       `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Investigation Status` AS C3,
       `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Assigned Group` AS C11,
     DATEDIFF('day',`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date`, CurrentDate()) AS C18,
      CASE
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 5 THEN '0 - 5 days'
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 15 THEN '6 - 15 days'
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 30 THEN '16 - 30 days'
         ELSE 'More than 30 days'
      END AS Aging,
      CASE
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 5 THEN 1
         ELSE 0
      END AS C24,
      CASE
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) > 5
         AND DATEDIFF('day', `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 15 THEN 1
         ELSE 0
      END AS C25,
      CASE
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) > 15
         AND DATEDIFF('day', `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 30 THEN 1
         ELSE 0
      END AS C26,
      CASE
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) > 30 THEN 1
         ELSE 0
      END AS C27
   FROM `AR System Schema`.`PBM:Problem Investigation`
WHERE (`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Company` In ($Company)) 
AND (`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Assigned Group` In ($AssignedGroup)) 
AND (`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Impact` In ($Impact))
AND (`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Investigation Status` NOT In ('Draft','Completed','Closed','Cancelled'))

SELECT DISTINCT
      `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Problem Investigation ID`,
      `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Priority`,
       `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Investigation Status` AS C3,
       `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Assigned Group` AS C11,
     DATEDIFF('day',`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date`, CurrentDate()) AS C18,
      CASE
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 5 THEN '0 - 5 days'
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 15 THEN '6 - 15 days'
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 30 THEN '16 - 30 days'
         ELSE 'More than 30 days'
      END AS Aging,
      CASE
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 5 THEN 1
         ELSE 0
      END AS C24,
      CASE
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) > 5
         AND DATEDIFF('day', `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 15 THEN 1
         ELSE 0
      END AS C25,
      CASE
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) > 15
         AND DATEDIFF('day', `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 30 THEN 1
         ELSE 0
      END AS C26,
      CASE
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) > 30 THEN 1
         ELSE 0
      END AS C27
   FROM `AR System Schema`.`PBM:Problem Investigation`
WHERE (`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Company` In ($Company)) 
AND (`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Assigned Group` In ($AssignedGroup)) 
AND (`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Impact` In ($Impact))
AND (`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Investigation Status` NOT In ('Draft','Completed','Closed','Cancelled'))

SELECT DISTINCT
   `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Priority`,
      CASE
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 5 THEN '0 - 5 days'
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 15 THEN '6 - 15 days'
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 30 THEN '16 - 30 days'
         ELSE 'More than 30 days'
      END AS Aging,
      COUNT(`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Problem Investigation ID`) as count
   
FROM `AR System Schema`.`PBM:Problem Investigation`
WHERE (`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Investigation Status` NOT In ('Draft','Completed','Closed','Cancelled'))  
AND (`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Company` In ($Company)) 
AND (`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Assigned Group` In ($AssignedGroup)) 
AND (`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Impact` In ($Impact))
GROUP BY 
    `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Priority`,
    Aging

SELECT DISTINCT
      CASE
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(),`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Target Resolution Date`) <= 0 THEN 'Target Date Missed'
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(),`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Target Resolution Date`) <= 10 THEN 'Target Date Approaching'
         ELSE 'Target Date > 10 Days'
      END AS Target,
      COUNT(`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Problem Investigation ID`) as count
   
FROM `AR System Schema`.`PBM:Problem Investigation`
WHERE (`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Investigation Status` NOT In ('Draft','Completed','Closed','Cancelled'))  
AND (`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Company` In ($Company)) 
AND (`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Assigned Group` In ($AssignedGroup)) 
AND (`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Impact` In ($Impact))
GROUP BY 
        Target

SELECT DISTINCT
   `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Assigned Group`AS `Assigned Group`,
      CASE
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 5 THEN '0 - 5 days'
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 15 THEN '6 - 15 days'
         WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Submit Date`, currentDate()) <= 30 THEN '16 - 30 days'
         ELSE 'More than 30 days'
      END AS Aging,
      COUNT(`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Problem Investigation ID`) as count
   
FROM `AR System Schema`.`PBM:Problem Investigation`
WHERE (`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Investigation Status` NOT In ('Draft','Completed','Closed','Cancelled'))  
AND (`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Company` In ($Company)) 
AND (`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Assigned Group` In ($AssignedGroup)) 
AND (`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Impact` In ($Impact))
GROUP BY 
    `Assigned Group`,
    Aging

panels.title: Open Problems Aging by Assigned Group

list.definition: remedy,{"sql": "SELECT DISTINCT (CASE WHEN `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Company` IS NOT NULL THEN `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Company` ELSE 'Unknown' END) Company FROM `PBM:Problem Investigation` LIMIT 500"}
